reviews.review_description: No
I met a moderator a while ago who was being toxic and was saying I couldn’t do smth that was literally in the game. He kicked me 2 or 3 times I think and it was so annoying.

Well the game is alright it’s just don’t buy anything, I bought the googles for glass bridge and It was impossible for me and my friend to beat it so we went into a pub but there was no one online so we went back and I had to pay again to use it and didn’t work idk if it’s a bug but I can’t refund it and 8$ just went down the drain so I’m pissed do not download

developer_response.body: This has already been fixed and explained in our discord server

reviews.review_description: The game is awesome, packed full of fun in every lobby
When I open the game long loading screen when in the game it crashes I was able to see outside but only for 1 second please fix it

Game reminds me of another game, but I can’t quite seem to remember it!

Forest is good, shop is cool, game modes  are generic, but they nailed it!

Overhaul, the game is a work in progress so I can’t say much now. I’d give it a try still!

This is 100% unbiased and I’m totally not helping out with the game and giving behind the scenesfeedback!
Music was too loud in caves great cosmic glass bridge was hard ￼
You can play glass bridge,horror mode, and even just tag if you wanna get better! You can also buy a $7 mod menu in the shop!!! So yea i highly recommend this 👌
So when I try to play the game it’s not working ￼￼

I love the community’s niceness i love the game and all of the moderators are SO NICE 👍 and also don’t wanna be a begget but can I have mod I want to make this game a better game if you can reply official please do and keep up the amazing work 👋

This is divine and this is one of the best gtag fan games I’ve ever played, you should really go check this game out and support the devs buy purchasing something or even something as little as writing a review like I am

The game is fun no it dose not lag much and so gtag dose that two and u don’t complain let little creators know there game is good or at least decent none of theese games are bad some just work harder then others
I'd rate this a 5 because it has amazing and funny moderators and owners. Updates frequently. Has a good community. Lots of things to do in the game. So i'd rate it a 5
